channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump permanently seals family tax returns, raising concerns over transparency and political norms
item.description: This week, Donald Trump successfully achieved one of the boldest moves of his career by permanently sealing his family’s tax returns. The action has stirred debates over transparency and accountabilit...

item.title: Supreme Court allows return of certain persons sent to Bangladesh for citizenship verification
item.description: The Union government informed the Supreme Court on Friday that it would bring back some individuals who had earlier been sent to Bangladesh, in order to verify their Indian citizenship. This action is...

item.title: Papa Penny leaves MKP citing internal sabotage, joins Afrika Mayibuye Movement
item.description: Gezane “Papa Penny” Kobane, a veteran musician and former MP for the MK Party (MKP), has officially resigned from the party citing internal conflicts and sabotage. In an interview with Newzroom Afrika...

item.title: Jack Antonoff Talks Music, Life and Personal Reflections
item.description: Grammy-winning musician and producer Jack Antonoff, known for his collaborations with Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter, has been keeping busy with multiple projects, including soundtrack work for An...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of 'The Deer Hunter': Challenges, Dedication, and Unforgettable Moments
item.description: The making of Michael Cimino’s 1978 film 'The Deer Hunter' was as intense and legendary as the movie itself. Cimino demanded extreme realism, pushing actors and crew to their physical and emotional li...

item.title: Governor Fubara Confirms Continuation of Infrastructure Projects in Rivers State
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don reassure citizens say him administration still dey committed to finish all ongoing infrastructural projects across the state despite recent political ...

item.title: Gordon Parks Captures Eartha Kitt with Kittens in 1952 LIFE Photo Essay
item.description: In June 1952, legendary photographer Gordon Parks created a memorable series of portraits featuring Eartha Kitt for LIFE magazine. The photo essay captured intimate and stylish moments of Kitt while s...

item.title: NPA Files Appeal Over Magistrate’s Rulings in Sibanyoni Case
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) in South Africa has filed an application for leave to appeal against several orders issued by Chief Magistrate Tuletu Tonjeni in the case involving Joe ‘Ferrar...

item.title: Experts Warn Alberta Referendum May Impact Private Investment in National Projects
item.description: As Alberta moves closer to a potential referendum on separating from Canada, experts warn that uncertainty surrounding the vote could cause private investors to pause or reconsider their involvement i...

item.title: WHO warns of very high risk of Ebola spreading in DR Congo
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has just upgraded the risk of the Bundibugyo strain of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo to 'very high' at national level. This strain, which does not yet h...

item.title: Tanzania Reviews Education Act to Align with New Policy up to 2028
item.description: The Tanzanian government is actively reviewing the Education Act, Chapter 353, to align it with the newly launched Education Policy, aiming to guide the country's education system up to 2028. Minister...

item.title: Alycia Debnam-Carey is Single: Details on Her Past Rumours and Dating History
item.description: Alycia Debnam-Carey, the talented Australian actress known for her roles in popular TV shows like Fear the Walking Dead and The 100, is currently single as of 2026. She prefers to keep her personal li...

item.title: Government launches seven-point plan to drive industrialisation and support youth entrepreneurs

item.title: WHO increases Ebola alert in DRC amid rising suspected cases and reports hantavirus outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) don raise the Ebola outbreak risk level for Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to very high within the country as suspected cases near 750, with the disease don als...

item.title: Historic Persephone Boat from The Beachcombers Successfully Restored in Gibsons
item.description: The iconic red-and-black Persephone boat, featured in the long-running Canadian television series The Beachcombers, has been fully restored by the community of Gibsons, British Columbia. Originally na...

item.title: B.C. Conservative MP Welcomes Grandson Charlie Kirk Jansen
item.description: A Member of Parliament from British Columbia representing the Conservative Party has announced the birth of his grandson, Charlie Kirk Jansen. The MP shared the news publicly, expressing joy and pride...

item.title: Dr Ofweneke Biography: Kenyan Comedian Reveals Real Name Sande Bush Oyolo, Luhya Tribe Roots and Schooling
item.description: Dr Ofweneke, whose real name is Sande Bush Oyolo, is a popular Kenyan comedian, TV and radio host, actor and motivational speaker born on 17 January 1991 at Pumwani Hospital in Nairobi. The funnyman i...

item.title: Mother convicted of murdering her two children through poisoning in Johannesburg park
item.description: A 43-year-old Zimbabwean woman, Lister Nkomo, has been found guilty in the Johannesburg Magistrates’ Court for the murder of her two young children, following an incident at Empire Park in Parktown ne...

item.title: Analysing the impact of immigration on Australia’s housing market
item.description: The debate around immigration and its effect on housing affordability in Australia continues to capture public attention. Opposition Leader Angus Taylor has raised concerns suggesting that migrants co...

item.title: Momina Iqbal files complaint at Chung Police Station against PML-N MPA Saqib Chadhar for harassment, blackmail and threats
item.description: Renowned Pakistani actor and model Momina Iqbal has approached the Chung Police Station in Lahore to register an FIR against PML-N MPA Saqib Chadhar. She has levelled serious allegations including bla...
